# Software Requirements Specification (SRS) ## HomeCare - Healthcare Management System --- ## 1. Introduction ### 1.1 Purpose The purpose of this document is to provide a comprehensive description of the requirements for the HomeCare Health

-- RLS Policies for Appointments Table -- Run in Supabase SQL Editor -- Enable RLS ALTER TABLE appointments ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; -- Patients can create and view their appointments CREATE POLICY "Patients can create appointments" ON ap

-- Complete Appointments Table Schema with RLS for HomecareService -- Run this in Supabase SQL Editor (Dashboard > SQL Editor) -- 1. Create table if not exists (with all columns matching frontend code) CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.appo

-- Create profiles table for user profile management -- Run this SQL in your Supabase SQL Editor CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profiles ( id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, email TEXT,

-- Fix RLS for profiles table to allow authenticated users to insert/update own profile -- Run this in Supabase SQL Editor -- Drop existing policies if they exist DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view own profile" ON profiles; DROP POLICY I

-- Fixed RLS Policies for appointments table -- Your current policies reference NON-EXISTENT columns: doctor_id, nurse_id -- Table has provider_id only. Run this to fix 400 error. -- Enable UUID extension (safe) CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXIS
